heading: Chattahoochee River National Recreation Area Advisory Commission
label: 460ii–5 Chattahoochee River National Recreation Area Advisory Commission
notes: Amendments1999—Subsec. (a). , substituted “this subchapter” for “this subchapter and chapter 43 of this title” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 106–154, § 2(e)(5)Subsec. (d). , substituted “this subchapter” for “this subchapter and chapter 43 of this title”.Pub. L. 106–154, § 2(e)(6)

children.heading: Establishment; duties; membership: voting members and Park Superintendent as nonvoting member; Chairman
children.label: a Establishment; duties; membership: voting members and Park Superintendent as nonvoting member; Chairman
A
children.text: one of whom shall be recommended by the Board of County Commissioners of Forsyth County;

children.label: B
children.text: one of whom shall be recommended by the Board of County Commissioners of Fulton County;

children.label: C
children.text: one of whom shall be recommended by the Board of County Commissioners of Cobb County; and

children.label: D
children.text: one of whom shall be recommended by the Board of County Commissioners of Gwinnett County;
one member appointed from among individuals recommended by the Governor of Georgia;
one member appointed from among individuals recommended by the Atlanta Regional Commission;

four members appointed from among individuals recommended by a coalition of citizens public interest groups, recreational users, and environmental organizations concerned with the protection and preservation of the Chattahoochee River;
one member appointed from among individuals recommended by the Business Council of Georgia or by a local chamber of commerce in the vicinity of the recreation area; and
two members who represent the general public, at least one of whom shall be a resident of one of the counties referred to in paragraph (1).

Except as provided in paragraph (2), members of the Advisory Commission shall serve for terms of three years. Any voting member of the Advisory Commission may be reappointed for one additional three-year term.
The members first appointed under paragraph (1) shall serve for a term of one year. The members first appointed under paragraphs (2), (3), (5), and (6) shall serve for a term of two years.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: c Meetings
children.text: The Advisory Commission shall meet on a regular basis. Notice of meetings and agenda shall be published in local newspapers which have a distribution which generally covers the area affected by the park. Commission meetings shall be held at locations and in such a manner as to insure adequate public involvement.

children.heading: Compensation and expenses
children.label: d Compensation and expenses
children.text: Members of the Commission shall serve without compensation as such, but the Secretary may pay expenses reasonably incurred in carrying out their responsibilities under this subchapter on vouchers signed by the Chairman.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: e Termination
children.text: The Advisory Commission shall terminate on the date ten years after .October 30, 1984
